analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e class progression for Ability Score Improvement (ASI) features. The feature is named and attributed correctly to the 'druid' class.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is verbatim from the source material, clearly defining the benefit (increase one score by 2 OR two scores by 1) and the cap (20).
analysis.mechanics: Standard ASI mechanic. It grants flexibility in character building, allowing for optimization or rounding out lower scores. The levels specified (4, 8, 12, 16, 19) are the standard progression for this type of feature across most full classes, including Druid.
